message:
test(quake/renderer): add 34 comprehensive rasterizer tests (bd-a24ao)

Tests cover: z-buffer depth testing, backface culling, near-plane
clipping, fog calculation, background gradient caching, face centroid
lazy init, projection math, stats tracking, edge function math,
lerp, degenerate triangles, OOB vertex safety, E1M1 full scene,
face sorting, quad triangulation, 2-vertex face culling, and
light level brightness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
